title: tagetes pumila
intro: Tagetes pumila, also known as Dwarf Mexican Marigold, is a compact, shrub-like annual plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin irritations due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Tagetes pumila include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Tagetes pumila include teas, infusions, and topical applications, often used to calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing.
